hero.subtitle: Demo installations with the Aisti® tile, delivered from the pilot plant in Jyväskylä, Finland, and installed by professional teams.

supplier_head.title: Also from our suppliers.
supplier_head.body: Installations by Sappa and Mogu themselves, shown here as a preview of the finish and format range Beyond Rational brings to Denmark.

testimonial.quote: The ceiling reads as a calm, neutral surface — you would never guess it is doing acoustic work.
testimonial.name: Project architect

cases.title: Ångtvätten 22
cases.meta: Stora Essingen, Stockholm · Commercial office, 40,000 m² property
cases.body: Aisti® tiles in dark blue, 600×600 mm at 20 mm, installed in the standard T-grid by a professional team. The tiles absorb sound reflections and reduce echo — installed side-by-side with mineral wool to show no difference in acoustic performance.

cases.title: Bulevardi 2
cases.body: Aisti® tiles in white, 600×1200 mm at 40 mm, ceiling-mounted. Reverberation time — the time for sound to decay 60 dB — improved roughly 29% across the octave bands after installation.

list.title: Ångtvätten 22
list.meta: Stockholm · Office well-being · 600×600, 20 mm, dark blue
